title: Cloud Infrastructure Dashboard
description: A comprehensive AWS cloud monitoring dashboard built with Flutter and serverless architecture. Features real-time metrics, cost optimization insights, and automated scaling recommendations.
detailedDescription: This cloud infrastructure dashboard provides real-time monitoring and management of AWS resources. Built with Flutter for cross-platform compatibility, it offers intuitive visualizations of cloud metrics, automated cost optimization recommendations, and intelligent scaling suggestions. The dashboard integrates with AWS CloudWatch, DynamoDB, and Lambda functions to provide comprehensive infrastructure insights.

title: AI-Powered Portfolio Analyzer
description: Machine learning application that analyzes investment portfolios and provides personalized recommendations using Python, TensorFlow, and modern web technologies.
detailedDescription: An intelligent portfolio analysis platform that leverages machine learning algorithms to evaluate investment portfolios and provide personalized recommendations. The system uses TensorFlow for deep learning models, processes historical market data, and generates risk assessments and optimization suggestions. Features include portfolio diversification analysis, risk-return optimization, and predictive market trend analysis.

title: Real-time Chat Application
description: Scalable real-time messaging platform with end-to-end encryption, file sharing, and video calling capabilities built with Flutter and Firebase.
detailedDescription: A modern, secure messaging platform that enables real-time communication with advanced features. Built with Flutter for cross-platform compatibility and Firebase for backend services, it offers end-to-end encryption, file sharing, video calling, and group chat functionality. The application supports multiple media types, message reactions, and offline message synchronization.

title: E-commerce Microservices Platform
description: High-performance e-commerce platform built with microservices architecture, featuring inventory management, payment processing, and order fulfillment systems.
detailedDescription: A robust e-commerce platform designed with microservices architecture for scalability and maintainability. The system includes separate services for inventory management, payment processing, order fulfillment, user authentication, and recommendation engines. Built with Node.js and containerized with Docker, it provides high availability and horizontal scaling capabilities.

title: IoT Smart Home Controller
description: Internet of Things application for controlling smart home devices with voice commands, automation rules, and energy monitoring capabilities.
detailedDescription: An intelligent smart home control system that integrates various IoT devices through a unified Flutter application. The system supports voice commands, automated routines, energy monitoring, and remote device control. Built with Arduino microcontrollers, MQTT protocol for device communication, and AWS IoT for cloud connectivity, it provides a seamless smart home experience.

title: Cloud Budgeting + Insights Platform
description: Production-ready personal finance platform built with microservices architecture, real-time analytics, and a React dashboard for budgets, anomalies, and insights.
detailedDescription: A cloud-first budgeting and insights platform designed to demonstrate enterprise-grade engineering practices. It uses microservices for transaction management and analytics, containerized deployments on Kubernetes (EKS), infrastructure as code with Terraform, and CI/CD via Jenkins. The React frontend provides interactive dashboards, anomaly alerts, and spending insights backed by Prometheus metrics and health checks.
features: Anomaly detection and budget status insights
Interactive dashboard with charts and alerts
